title: Living in Boulder vlog 3 - 28 - 2017: 160 kilometer diameters in background

enrichment.summary: Kyle films a brief vlog update while working on mapping race distances and area dimensions. He also describes spending time reading Jane Mayer's 'Dark Money' and commenting on libertarian institute videos online, which he found ideologically manipulative.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: dismisses them as ideologically twisted and self-serving, comparing them to Scientology inventing its own history to keep the rich rich
thinks he should do it more but acknowledges it's outside his current focus
